summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 7 new features: Mi Perfil (profile management), Search bars in all views, and Estadísticas date range filter with product analysis. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Period selector lacks data-testid attribute - minor testability issue

passed_tests: Login with andy.escudero / secreto
GET /api/perfil returns user data without password_hash
PUT /api/perfil updates profile fields (nombre, telefono, ciudad, direccion)
PUT /api/perfil/password with wrong current password returns error
PUT /api/perfil/password with correct password succeeds
POST /api/perfil/foto accepts file upload (base64 encoded)
GET /api/estadisticas/ventas-por-periodo accepts fecha_desde and fecha_hasta params
GET /api/estadisticas/ingresos-por-periodo returns merged income/expense data
GET /api/estadisticas/producto-detalle returns ventas and compras for specific product
GET /api/estadisticas/compras-por-periodo accepts date filters
GET /api/estadisticas/productos-mas-vendidos accepts date filters
GET /api/productos with search parameter works
GET /api/clientes with search parameter works
GET /api/proveedores with search parameter works
Mi Perfil: sidebar profile button navigates to profile view
Mi Perfil: shows user name, email, role, edit fields (nombre, telefono, ciudad, direccion)
Mi Perfil: photo upload input present
Mi Perfil: password change fields present (actual, nueva, confirmar)
Search bar in Ventas view filters by client name
Search bar in Compras view filters by provider name
Search bar in Clientes view filters by name/RUC/city
Search bar in Proveedores view filters by name/contact
Search bar in Gastos view filters by category/description
Search bar in Productos view filters by code/name
Estadísticas: date range inputs (fecha-desde, fecha-hasta) present and functional
Estadísticas: period selector (día/semana/mes/año) works
Estadísticas: 'Análisis Producto' button opens modal with product selector
Estadísticas: Product analysis modal shows Stock, Costo, Precio, Ventas por Período, Compras por Período
Ingresos vs Compras vs Gastos chart renders in estadísticas
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding data-testid to period selector in EstadisticasView for better testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features fully tested: (1) Mi Perfil - profile editing, password change, photo upload all working. (2) Search bars added to Ventas, Compras, Clientes, Proveedores, Gastos views - all functional with client-side filtering. (3) Estadísticas - date range filter (fecha_desde, fecha_hasta), period selector (día/semana/mes/año), and 'Análisis Producto' modal with per-product stats (ventas/compras by period) all working. Previous iterations 1-6 tested auth, dashboard, widgets, metas, shared templates, CRUD - all remain stable.
